mapper.select: SELECT dept.homepage_id, work.dept_idx, work.work_idx, work.parent_idx, dept.dept_name, work.position, work.worker, work.phone, work.work_info, work.print_seq, dept.above_idx FROM DEPT_MNG dept, WORK_MNG work WHERE dept.homepage_id = work.homepage_id AND dept.dept_idx = work.dept_idx AND dept.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY dept_print_seq ASC, print_seq ASC

SELECT dept.homepage_id, work.dept_idx, work.work_idx, work.parent_idx, dept.dept_name, work.position, work.worker, work.phone, work.work_info, work.print_seq FROM DEPT_MNG dept, WORK_MNG work WHERE dept.homepage_id = work.homepage_id AND dept.dept_idx = work.dept_idx AND dept.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND work_idx = #{work_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORK_MNG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq), 0)+1 FROM WORK_MNG WHERE homepage_id=#{homepage_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(work_idx), 0)+1 FROM WORK_MNG WHERE homepage_id=#{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO WORK_MNG ( homepage_id, dept_idx, work_idx, parent_idx, position, worker, phone, work_info, print_seq, add_id, add_date ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{dept_idx}, #{work_idx}, #{parent_idx}, #{position}, #{worker}, #{phone}, #{work_info}, #{print_seq}, #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE WORK_MNG SET dept_idx = #{dept_idx}, parent_idx = #{parent_idx}, position = #{position}, worker = #{worker}, phone = #{phone}, work_info = #{work_info}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND work_idx = #{work_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT homepage_id, dept_idx, dept_name, dept_print_seq, above_idx, add_id, add_date, mod_id, mod_date, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORK_MNG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND dept_idx = d.dept_idx ) AS in_cnt FROM DEPT_MNG d WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ) START WITH above_idx = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR dept_idx = above_idx ORDER SIBLINGS BY dept_print_seq ASC
SELECT NVL(MAX(dept_print_seq), 0)+10 FROM dept_mng WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPT_MNG SET dept_name = #{dept_name}, above_idx = #{above_idx}, dept_print_seq = #{dept_print_seq}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND dept_idx = #{dept_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT chart_yn FROM DEPT_CHART WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO DEPT_CHART DC USING DUAL ON (homepage_id = #{homepage_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET chart_yn = #{chart_yn} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, chart_yn ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{chart_yn} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT work.dept_idx, work.work_idx, dept.dept_name, work.worker, work.phone, dept.above_idx, dept.dept_print_seq FROM DEPT_MNG dept, WORK_MNG work WHERE dept.homepage_id = work.homepage_id AND dept.dept_idx = work.dept_idx AND dept.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY dept.dept_print_seq ASC, print_seq ASC ) START WITH above_idx = 0 CONNECT BY above_idx = PRIOR dept_idx ORDER SIBLINGS BY dept_print_seq ASC
